title: Move a Group to another Board with Automation

posts.author: J_TCI (Jeffrey Ohata)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking for an automation option to move a group to another board utilizing automation. For instance if I create an '“Archive” board, I would like to automate a group being moved from our “Main” board to the “Archive” board based on a status change of an item within that group. Case use is to declutter the “Main” board from unneeded groups but still being able to be easily accessed and expanded when a need arrives (unlike the official archive feature).
